items.title: The 'first' AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
items.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials - meaning it wasn't...

items.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
items.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

items.summary: With iOS 27 and its companion systems, Apple is introducing a new version of its system-level RAW image processing engine. It uses machine learning to greatly improve detail and reduce noise, including when reprocessing older RAW photos....

items.title: BMW's iX4 EV captured with a new look as its debut nears [Images]
items.summary: The 2027 iX4 is set to join BMW's electric vehicle lineup soon, bringing a new coupe SUV-like style to the family. Ahead of its debut, the 2027 BMW iX4 was spotted ripping around the Nürburgring, flaunting its new look.
